arts.ttl: Injury Blows Slow Down Talks Between Inter and Roma
arts.sum: Inter will be without Hakan Calhanoglu for multiple games, while Henrikh Mkhitaryan will sit out one or two more tilts, and their injuries don’t help the negotiation with Roma regarding Davide Frattesi. The Turk suffered a calf problem. The post Injury Blows Slow Down Talks Between Inter and Roma appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
